auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.accountCreated: Account created! You can now log in.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Record
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Manage purchase orders
purchaseOrders.approveDesc: Approve {{number}}? Status will change from Draft to Confirmed and it can no longer be edited.
purchaseOrders.cancelDesc: This will cancel the PO. You cannot cancel if a GRN is already linked.
purchaseOrders.bannerNonDraft: This PO is {{status}}. You can only edit Received Date and Notes.
purchaseOrders.autoGrnStep1: All ordered items will be added to the GRN with their full ordered quantities.
purchaseOrders.autoGrnStep2: Quality status will default to Pending — you can review and update it in the GRN.
purchaseOrders.autoGrnStep3: Stock will be posted to {{warehouse}} once the GRN is verified and posted.
purchaseOrders.autoGrnStep4: You can still edit quantities, racks, and batch details directly in the generated GRN.

purchaseReturns.title: Purchase Returns
purchaseReturns.subtitle: Manage purchase returns
purchaseReturns.formSubtitle: Manage purchase returns to vendors. Create as draft, then dispatch to reduce stock.

productInventory.title: Product Inventory
productInventory.subtitle: View inventory by product
productInventory.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this?

stockTransfers.title: Stock Transfers
stockTransfers.subtitle: Transfer stock between warehouses
stockTransfers.transferConfirmed: Transfer confirmed — stock deducted from source warehouse
stockTransfers.transferReceived: Transfer received — stock added to destination warehouse
stockTransfers.noStockInWarehouse: No products with available stock in this warehouse

stockLedger.title: Stock Ledger
stockLedger.subtitle: Transaction history by product and warehouse

salesOrders.title: Sales Orders
salesOrders.subtitle: Manage customer orders
salesOrders.deleteDesc: This will permanently remove the draft order. Continue?
salesOrders.cancelDesc: This will mark the order as cancelled. Continue?

invoicesPage.title: Invoices
invoicesPage.subtitle: Generate from confirmed sales orders; issue to finalise
invoicesPage.confirmedOrders: Confirmed / Pick ready / Dispatched sales order
invoicesPage.deleteDesc: Only draft invoices can be deleted. Are you sure?

salesReturns.title: Sales Returns
salesReturns.subtitle: Manage sales returns
salesReturns.createSubtitle: Create returns; receive to update stock and create credit note
salesReturns.deleteDesc: Only draft returns can be deleted. Are you sure?
salesReturns.addAtLeastOneItem: Add at least one item with product and quantity greater than 0

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your application and warehouse configurations
settings.autoAllocationDesc: Automatically suggest racks based on proximity and availability
settings.strictCapacityCheckDesc: Prevent overstocking racks beyond their defined capacity
settings.multiWarehouseSearchDesc: Search for stock across all warehouses when assigning orders
settings.inventoryRulesDesc: Configure how products and stock are managed
settings.enableExpiryTrackingDesc: Track manufacturing and expiry dates for batches
settings.alertSettingsDesc: Choose how you want to be notified of critical events
settings.lowStockAlertsDesc: Get notified when stock levels fall below threshold
settings.capacityWarningsDesc: Alert when a warehouse or rack is above 90% capacity
settings.movementAlertsDesc: Notify on significant stock movements or transfers

gstConfig.title: GST Configuration
gstConfig.subtitle: Configure your GST settings
gstConfig.subtitleCreate: Add your company GST details (one config per tenant)
gstConfig.cardDescCreate: Only one GST configuration is allowed per tenant. Fill the form and save.
gstConfig.cardDescEdit: Update the fields below and click Update. You can delete this configuration (hard delete).
gstConfig.compositionSchemeDesc: Enable if registered under GST composition scheme
gstConfig.serverErrorLong: Server error. Please try again later.
gstConfig.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete the GST configuration. This action cannot be undone.

agingReport.title: Accounts Receivable Aging
agingReport.subtitle: Track outstanding customer payments and overdue invoices

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage tenant users. Only admins can create or edit.
users.deactivateDesc: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to sign in. You can reactivate by editing the user later.
users.noUsersFound: No users found. Add a user to get started.

productDetails.title: Product Details
productDetails.noStock: No stock found for this product
productDetails.noRackLocations: No rack locations assigned to this product.
productDetails.noPurchaseHistory: No purchase history found for this product.
productDetails.noSalesHistory: No sales history found for this product.

warehouseDetails.title: Warehouse Details
warehouseDetails.rackListDesc: List of all storage locations in this warehouse

csvImport.title: Import Products from CSV
csvImport.description: Upload a CSV file to bulk-import products.

inventoryStock.title: Inventory (Stock Summary)
inventoryStock.subtitle: View and manage stock levels. Add opening stock or adjust quantities.

deliveryChallans.title: Delivery Challans
deliveryChallans.subtitle: Manage stock dispatch and generate invoices
deliveryChallans.searchPlaceholder: Search by DC #, SO # or Customer...
deliveryChallans.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this delivery challan? This cannot be undone.
deliveryChallans.dispatchedSuccess: Challan dispatched; Stock updated & Invoice generated

revenueReport.title: Revenue & Sales Analysis
revenueReport.subtitle: Real-time revenue metrics, trends, and analytical breakdown

sampleData.importVendorsDesc: Upload a CSV file to import multiple vendors at once.
sampleData.importCustomersDesc: Upload a CSV file to import multiple customers at once.
sampleData.importProductsDesc: Upload a CSV file to import multiple products at once. The system will validate each row and report any errors.
sampleData.downloadTemplateDesc: Use the template to see the exact column format expected.
sampleData.orClickBrowse: or click to browse · .csv files only

aiChatbot.title: Warehouse AI Assistant
aiChatbot.subtitle: Online · Powered by GPT-4o mini
aiChatbot.welcome:
👋 Hello! I'm your **Warehouse AI Assistant**. I can help you with:
- 📦 Stock levels & product locations
- 📋 Creating orders & GRNs
- ⚠️ Low-stock alerts
- 🏭 How to use the system

What would you like to know?
aiChatbot.errorMessage: ⚠️ Sorry, I couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
suggestions: What products are low on stock?
How do I add a new product?
Where is Ceramic Floor Tile stored?
How do I create a purchase order?
Show me the top stocked items
